name: Maitong Sunshine Cultural Development Co., Ltd
summary: Corporate Structure Maitong Sunshine Cultural Development Co., Limited (MGSD) was incorporated in the State of Nevada on October 26, 2023. Our website address is www.maitongsunshine.com. Our website and the information contained on, or that can be accessed through, the website is not deemed to be incorporated by reference in, and is not considered part of, this Report.
